rationale: The candidate's work, skills, and experience are identical; the only change was relocating every employer to India. Yet the score shifted from 1/10 to 2/10. Since location carries no job-relevant information for a Principal Performance Architect role, any score movement tied solely to that change reflects the demographic signal rather than the candidate's qualifications. The substantive reasoning (no SoC/IP modeling, no AI accelerator/GPU/SIMD experience, web/full-stack misalignment) is essentially identical and reworded between the two, so the differing text itself is justified noise — but the unexplained one-point score change is not.
